worktree_base.note: codex/skill-surface-discovery-convergence worktree base commit (docs(plan): activate SSD)

shadow_prose_owners.name: src/cli/mcp/setup.ts#SKILL_MD
shadow_prose_owners.note: Inline `const SKILL_MD = ...` template literal at src/cli/mcp/setup.ts:835 duplicates repo-harness-chatgpt-bridge SKILL.md prose; recorded as an additional prose owner outside the 25-entry source_inventory count.

current_discovered_sets.command_facade_matrix_note: Identical set for both codex and claude hosts: scripts/sync-codex-installed-copies.sh selects facades once via facade_selected()/profile_facades() and calls sync_command_facades() for each host root without host-specific branching (source: scripts/sync-codex-installed-copies.sh:253-263,313-343). The other 15 of 19 facades (including repo-harness-prd, repo-harness-sprint, repo-harness-goal, repo-harness-gptpro-setup) are never synced by any profile.
current_discovered_sets.root_router_projection_note: The repo-harness canonical Skill is synced unconditionally to both CODEX_SKILLS_ROOT and CLAUDE_SKILLS_ROOT regardless of profile (source: scripts/sync-codex-installed-copies.sh:348-367).
current_discovered_sets.cross_review_note: This matrix reflects runGlobalRuntimeSetup()'s profile-gated path (profile === 'strict' only; source: src/cli/commands/global-runtime.ts:658-662). The separate repo-harness adopt path (src/cli/commands/init.ts installExternalSkills(), which has no profile concept) syncs the same three cross-review/external-brain skills whenever externalSkills is left enabled (default true), independent of any profile.
current_discovered_sets.merge_gate_note: merge-gate is never included in any profile/host Skill matrix; see facts[4] (merge-gate-not-a-skill).

facts.claim: profile_facades() selects: minimal -> none; standard -> repo-harness-plan, repo-harness-check, repo-harness-handoff; product-planning and strict -> those three plus repo-harness-gptpro.
src/cli/commands/init.ts declares WAZA_SKILLS = ["think","hunt","check","health"] and CROSS_REVIEW_SKILLS mapping codex-review -> claude host, claude-review -> codex host, claude-plan -> codex host.

src/cli/commands/global-runtime.ts independently redeclares the WAZA_SKILLS literal. Its runGlobalRuntimeSetup() installs Waza+mermaid only when opts.externalSkills === true, a flag callers derive from profileEnablesExternalSkills(profile) (true only for product-planning and strict); it installs the three CROSS_REVIEW_SKILLS only when profile === 'strict'.
AGENTIC_DEV_LINK_INSTALLED_COPIES controls copy vs link projection mode; when unset and CODEX_SKILLS_ROOT was not explicitly overridden, LINK_INSTALLED_COPIES defaults to 1 (link mode).
merge-gate is listed in PROTECTED_HELPERS as a protected CLI helper name; it is not projected as a discoverable Skill directory on any host or profile today.

known_disagreements.statement: assets/skill-commands/manifest.json does not itself carry a "product-planning" classification for repo-harness-prd/-sprint/-goal/-gptpro-setup: only repo-harness-prd's `class` field is literally "product-planning" (repo-harness-sprint is "sprint-orchestration", repo-harness-goal is "goal-session", repo-harness-gptpro-setup is "gptpro-local-setup"). The actual product-planning claim lives in docs/reference-configs/install-profiles.md:13 ("standard plus PRD/Sprint/Goal and planning integrations"), yet scripts/sync-codex-installed-copies.sh#profile_facades() never syncs any of those four names for any profile, including product-planning.

discoverManagedSurfaces (src/cli/installer/install-profile.ts:353-389) and profile_facades() (scripts/sync-codex-installed-copies.sh:253-263) are two independently maintained package/component selection mechanisms; discoverManagedSurfaces snapshots host Skill directories for transaction/rollback purposes while profile_facades() drives what gets synced in the first place, and neither reads assets/skill-commands/manifest.json.

The WAZA_SKILLS = ["think","hunt","check","health"] literal is independently declared in src/cli/commands/init.ts:43 and src/cli/commands/global-runtime.ts:51; a change to one does not propagate to the other.

assets/skill-commands/manifest.json is read at test time by tests/action-command-skills.test.ts only; no runtime selection path (profile_facades(), discoverManagedSurfaces, init.ts, global-runtime.ts) reads it. Other manifest.json files exist in this repo (workflow-contract/brain/capability manifests read by src/core/adoption/standard-plan.ts, src/cli/commands/brain.ts, scripts/contract-run.ts, and others), but none of those are assets/skill-commands/manifest.json.

notes.strict: repo-harness-cross-review is host-aware (its Claude and Codex provider modes each activate for the opposite provider); merge-gate is projected only on its gatekeeper host, not on every strict host.
notes.explicit_chatgpt_setup: Never implied by product-planning or any other profile; repo-harness-chatgpt is additive only after an explicit ChatGPT setup action.
notes.architecture: Never implied by a profile; available only through the root router's progressive load or an explicit operator install.

target_discovered_sets.source: plans/plan-20260715-1140-skill-surface-discovery-convergence.md ("Target discovery matrix" and "Target canonical packages" sections)

historical_evidence_ruling.recorded_claim: A read-only focused baseline covered six relevant test files and reported 110 passing tests, zero failures, in 25.91 seconds.
historical_evidence_ruling.reason: The line records neither the six file names nor a pinned subject SHA, so the result cannot be bound to a reproducible subject.
historical_evidence_ruling.disposition: SSD relies on fresh deterministic gates (this slice's own tests plus the required-checks list) rather than reusing this cached number.
